findings.title: Optimize 10MB hero headshot image
findings.what: Compress PLA-Headshot.jpg from 10MB to <500KB using sharp/squoosh or convert to WebP. Add width/height and priority props to the Next.js Image component in Hero.tsx.
findings.why: A 10MB image decimates page load on mobile and tanks Core Web Vitals (LCP). Single biggest performance win available.

findings.title: Add robots.txt and sitemap generation
findings.what: Create Next.js App Router robots.ts and sitemap.ts files to auto-generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml with project detail page URLs.
findings.why: No robots.txt or sitemap means search engines have no guidance crawling the site. Basic SEO table stakes for a portfolio that should be discoverable.

findings.title: Configure next.config.ts with image optimization and security headers
findings.what: Add image remotePatterns config, security headers (X-Frame-Options, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options), and output standalone for smaller deploys.
findings.why: next.config.ts is completely empty. Missing image optimization config forces ImageWithFallback to use unoptimized flag. Security headers are free protection.

findings.title: Remove dead root-level markdown files
findings.what: Delete orphaned spec/vision markdown files that belong to other repos. Replace boilerplate create-next-app README with a minimal project README or remove it.
findings.why: Dead files in root create confusion about what belongs to this project. CHESS_TRAINER_PROJECT.md and ELUCIDATE_VISION.md are for elucidate-chess repo, not portfolio.

findings.title: Add JSON-LD structured data for person and portfolio
findings.what: Add Schema.org Person structured data in layout.tsx and SoftwareApplication/CreativeWork structured data on each project detail page.
findings.why: Structured data enables rich search results (knowledge panel, project cards). High leverage for a portfolio site where discoverability matters.

findings.title: Consolidate duplicate theme localStorage keys
findings.what: Portfolio.tsx uses localStorage key 'ch-theme' while ThemeProvider.tsx uses 'portfolio-theme'. Consolidate to one key and remove the unused ThemeProvider if Portfolio.tsx handles theming directly.
findings.why: Two competing theme systems means theme preference could get out of sync. ThemeProvider context appears unused now that Portfolio.tsx manages its own theme state.

findings.title: Add preload hints and font-display swap for web fonts
findings.what: Verify Google Fonts are loaded with display=swap (already partially done via next/font). Add preconnect to fonts.gstatic.com if missing. Consider self-hosting the three fonts (Inter, Syne, JetBrains Mono) to eliminate third-party requests.
findings.why: Third-party font requests add latency and are a GDPR concern in some regions. Self-hosting fonts with next/font/local eliminates external dependencies and improves TTFB.
